purpose: Validate future Daily Guidance rule candidates and produce preview-only selections without enabling live dynamic guidance.

validation_rules.description: Each guidance rule must use an allowed D03 rule_type.
Each guidance rule must use an allowed D03 tone.
Each rule must carry draft, needs_review, approved, or rejected status.
Each rule must include a source_basis explaining why the rule exists.
Each public-facing text must have English and Hindi copy.
Preview selection must not update public daily-context output.

guardrails: Do not make public Daily Guidance dynamic in this stage.
Do not present guidance as deterministic prediction.
